description: Join tiles + latest tile_locations + current tile_state into tile_info; drop tiles that are dead.
sql: WITH latest_loc AS (SELECT tile_uuid, latitude, longitude, last_timestamp, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tile_uuid ORDER BY last_timestamp DESC) AS rn FROM sources.tile_tile_locations) SELECT t.tile_uuid AS tile_uuid, t.name AS name, t.tile_type AS tile_type, t.firmware_version AS firmware_version, t.hardware_version AS hardware_version, l.latitude AS latitude, l.longitude AS longitude, l.last_timestamp AS last_seen_at, s.battery_level AS battery_level, s.battery_state AS battery_state, s.connection_state AS connection_state, s.is_dead AS is_dead, 'tile' AS source, NULL::TIMESTAMP AS _dlt_valid_to FROM sources.tile_tiles t LEFT JOIN latest_loc l ON l.tile_uuid = t.tile_uuid AND l.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN sources.tile_tile_state s ON s.tile_uuid = t.tile_uuid AND s._dlt_valid_to IS NULL WHERE t._dlt_valid_to IS NULL AND COALESCE(s.is_dead, FALSE) = FALSE
